description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a casual urban outfit, featuring a collared shirt layered under a loose sweater and paired with straight-cut trousers. The figure stands upright with arms slightly extended at the sides, hands relaxed and fingers naturally splayed. The head is sculpted with short, neatly styled hair, and the facial features are defined but neutral. The shoes are formal, suggesting a smart-casual appearance suitable for city environments. The clothing fits comfortably, with the sweater and trousers showing subtle creases and folds for realism. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall build is average and proportional.
description: An adult male in a collared shirt, sweater, and trousers stands upright with formal shoes and neatly styled short hair. The figure has a smart-casual urban appearance and a relaxed, natural posture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the collared shirt under a sweater, straight trousers, formal shoes, and a clear view of the face and hair.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the layering of the sweater over the shirt, and the relaxed arm and hand posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the sweater's fit, and the straight fall of the trousers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and leg alignment, with visible hand details.
attribute_clothing_type: casual collared shirt layered under a loose sweater with straight-cut trousers
